scripts.check:proto: npm run generate && git diff --exit-code -- packages/go/converter/internal/emit/turnoutpb packages/ts/scene-runner/src/types
scripts.check:fieldtype: ! find packages/go/converter/internal -name '*.go' | xargs grep -En 'var [A-Za-z_, ]+ (ast\.)?FieldType$' || (echo 'ERROR: bare FieldType declaration found (zero-value hazard — initialise to FieldTypeInvalid)' && exit 1)
scripts.test: (cd packages/ts/runtime && ./node_modules/.bin/vitest --run) && (cd packages/ts/scene-runner && GOCACHE=/workspace/.go-cache ./node_modules/.bin/vitest --run) && (cd packages/go/converter && GOCACHE=/workspace/.go-cache /usr/local/go/bin/go test ./...)
scripts.test:coverage: (cd packages/ts/runtime && ./node_modules/.bin/vitest --run --coverage) && (cd packages/ts/scene-runner && GOCACHE=/workspace/.go-cache ./node_modules/.bin/vitest --run --coverage) && (cd packages/go/converter && GOCACHE=/workspace/.go-cache /usr/local/go/bin/go test ./... && GOCACHE=/workspace/.go-cache /usr/local/go/bin/go test -coverprofile=/tmp/turnout-converter.coverage.out ./internal/lexer ./internal/state && /usr/local/go/bin/go tool cover -func=/tmp/turnout-converter.coverage.out)
